description: Workflow to fetch NBA scores, persist details, and notify subscribers
name: nba_scores_daily_workflow

transitions.description: Start fetching NBA scores for a given date
transitions.name: start_fetch_scores

externalized_processors.description: Fetch NBA scores asynchronously from external API
externalized_processors.name: process_fetch_scores

transitions.description: Persist detailed game data after fetching scores
transitions.name: persist_game_details

transitions.description: Send daily NBA score notifications to subscribers
transitions.end_state_description: Subscribers have been notified via email
transitions.name: notify_subscribers

externalized_processors.description: Compose and send email notifications to subscribers
externalized_processors.name: process_notify_subscribers
